flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Baker College are 35% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($35.8k vs $54.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 44% at Baker College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.0k vs 5.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Baker College fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1k → 3.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Baker College fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (15.0% → 13.1%).
